title: Account
description: Manage your account settings and security
profileDescription: Your identity details on the Roviq platform. Contact a platform administrator to request changes.
roviqIdDescription: Your unique Roviq ID is used to sign in and cannot be changed.
emailDescription: Used for security notifications and account recovery. Click the eye icon to reveal, or copy to clipboard.
scopeDescription: Determines which areas of Roviq you can sign in to.

fieldHelp.roviqIdBody: Your personal sign-in username, assigned by the platform when your account was created. It is not an email, not a phone number, and cannot be changed — treat it like an employee ID that follows you even if you change institutes. If you forget it, any platform admin can look it up from your registered email.
fieldHelp.emailBody: Used for security alerts, OTP delivery during password reset, and legal notices like plan-change confirmations. Keep it current — if you lose access to this address, account recovery requires a verified manual review by platform support, which can take 2–3 working days.
fieldHelp.scopeBody: Which portal of Roviq this account can sign in to. A single person can hold multiple accounts (e.g. platform admin + personal institute user) but each account is locked to exactly one scope — switching scopes requires a new account.
fieldHelp.scopePlatformBody: Platform admin — can manage institutes, resellers, plans, and platform-wide audit logs. Signs in at admin.roviq.com. Sessions expire every 5 minutes for security.
fieldHelp.scopeResellerBody: Reseller — can request new institutes, manage billing for their portfolio, and view reseller-level audit logs. Signs in at reseller.roviq.com. Sessions expire every 10 minutes.
fieldHelp.scopeInstituteBody: Institute — standard user of one or more institutes (teacher, clerk, parent, student). Signs in at app.roviq.com. Sessions expire every 15 minutes with refresh token continuity.
